command.text:
&CreateTicket;
declare @exciseTax char(1) select @exciseTax = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_thue_ttdb' select 'this._voucherCode='@@id';' + ';this._hideExciseTax=' + case when @exciseTax = '0' then 'true' else 'false' end + ';this._key = ''' + @ticket + ''';load$GridVoucherDetail$(this);' as message return

action.text:
&EnvironmentTaxGetUOMConversion;
declare @rate numeric(16, 5) if exists(select 1 from dmqddvt where dvt = @dvt and (ma_vt = @ma_vt or ma_vt = '*')) begin select @rate = he_so from dmqddvt where dvt = @dvt and (ma_vt = @ma_vt or ma_vt = '*') select isnull(@rate, 1) as he_so&EnvironmentTaxUOMReturn; return end

if exists(select 1 from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt) begin declare @unitCode varchar(32) select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end exec FastBusiness$Voucher$ImportPurchase$Item @unitCode, @ma_vt, @voucherCode, @@userID, @@admin, @ma_kho&EnvironmentTaxParameter; return end

declare @unitCode varchar(32) select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end if exists(select 1 from dmkho where ma_kho = @ma_kho and ma_dvcs = @unitCode&SiteCheck;) begin exec FastBusiness$Voucher$Receipt$Site @unitCode, @ma_vt, @ma_kho return end

if exists(select 1 from dmthue where ma_thue = @ma_thue) begin select a.thue_suat, rtrim(a.tk_thue_no3) as tk_thue_no3, isnull(b.tk_cn, 0) as thue_cn from dmthue a left join dmtk b on a.tk_thue_no3 = b.tk where a.ma_thue = @ma_thue return end else if @ma_thue = '' begin select 0 as thue_suat, '' as tk_thue_no3, 0 as thue_cn return end

if exists(select 1 from dmthuenk where ma_thue = @ma_thue_nk) begin select thue_suat as thue_suat_nk, rtrim(tk_thue) as tk_thue_nk from dmthuenk where ma_thue = @ma_thue_nk return end else if @ma_thue_nk = '' begin select 0 as thue_suat_nk, '' as tk_thue_nk return end

if exists(select 1 from dmthuettdb where ma_thue = @ma_thue_ttdb) begin select thue_suat as thue_suat_ttdb, rtrim(tk_thue) as tk_thue_ttdb from dmthuettdb where ma_thue = @ma_thue_ttdb return end else if @ma_thue_ttdb = '' begin select 0 as thue_suat_ttdb, '' as tk_thue_ttdb return end
if exists(select 1 from dmtk where tk = @tk_thue and loai_tk = 1) begin select tk_cn as thue_cn from dmtk where tk = @tk_thue return end

query.text: select @@fieldExternal from @@prime$partition$current a left join dmvt b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt left join dmtk c on a.tk_thue = c.tk where @@whereClause order by @@orderByClause
